subject: fix(charts): adjust repo category colors for better contrast
body:
Discontinued repos: gray-600 (#4b5563) — dark, clearly faded
Internal repos: gray-400 (#9ca3af) — neutral mid-tone, not competing
with public repo palette colors

Previous values (gray-500 + gray-200) were either too close together
or too bright on the dark chart background.
